chest_cm.tip: Measure at armpit level, exhaling gently

waist_cm.tip: Measure the narrowest part of the torso, between ribs and hips

abdomen_cm.tip: Measure at navel level, without holding your stomach in

hip_cm.tip: Measure the widest point of your hips and glutes

thigh_cm.label: Thigh

calf_cm.label: Calf
calf_cm.tip: At the widest point of the calf, standing

help.title: Help
help.faqSubtitle: Find quick answers to the most common questions.

cancelAppointment.question: How do I cancel an appointment?
cancelAppointment.answer: Open the "My Appointments" section from the main menu. Select the appointment you want to cancel and tap "Cancel appointment". Keep in mind some appointments have a cancellation policy requiring at least 24 hours' notice.

viewRoutines.question: How do I view my routines?
viewRoutines.answer: Go to the "My Routines" tab in the main menu. There you'll find the routines assigned by your coach, along with the corresponding exercises, sets, and reps.

changePlan.question: Can I change my plan?
changePlan.answer: Plan changes must be handled directly with the gym administrator. Contact your gym through the "Contact" section to request the change.

pointsSystem.question: How does the points system work?
pointsSystem.answer: You earn points (XP) by completing appointments, routines, and challenges. They let you level up and unlock achievements. You can check your score and ranking position from the "Gamification" section.

forgotPassword.question: What do I do if I forgot my password?
forgotPassword.answer: On the login screen, tap "Forgot your password?" and enter your email address. You'll receive a link to reset it. Also check your spam folder if you don't see it.

updateProfilePhoto.question: How do I update my profile photo?
updateProfilePhoto.answer: Go to the "My Profile" section from the menu. Tap your current avatar and select "Change photo" to choose an image from your gallery. Your photo will update automatically on your profile.

help.supportDesc: Our team is ready to assist you with any further questions.
